name: Sarah Jenkins
bio: Grew up on the same street. She's a pediatric nurse now and loves talking about her golden retriever.

name: Marcus Chen
bio: Former manager at my first job. Great source of career advice and shares a passion for mechanical keyboards.

name: Elena Rodriguez
bio: Studied abroad together in Madrid. She's currently living in Chicago and working as a graphic designer.

name: David 'Dax' Miller
bio: Part of my weekly D&D group. Known him since high school. Always down for a late-night strategy game.

name: Priya Sharma
bio: Was my lab partner in Chemistry. She just launched her own biotech startup. We usually catch up once a quarter.

name: Jordan Taylor
bio: Lives two floors down. We usually hit the gym together on Tuesday mornings and grab coffee after.

name: Aunt Martha
bio: Dad's older sister. Makes the best apple pie and always wants to hear about my latest vacation.

name: Samir Gupta
bio: Met at a jazz festival last year. We trade Spotify playlists every week and try to hit one show a month.
